title: CM VMs: bump f39/f38 to f40/f39
body:
Images built in https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/349

Include a **TEMPORARY** workaround for Debian Pasta Apparmor bug
that is preventing use of /var/tmp.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

The pasta bug has nothing to do with `/var/tmp`, it [fails on /tmp also](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5443859155517440/html/int-podman-debian-13-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-run-with-mac-address-flag-Podman-run-mac-address-with-custom-network--1):
```
           $ podman [options] run --network n11bdd3f5a7940d15622d2560b81d91e29992365ed6bc57a0f312ce13183c8b806 --mac-address 92:d0:c6:00:29:34 quay.io/libpod/alpine:latest ip addr
           Error: setting up Pasta: pasta failed with exit code 1:
           Couldn't open network namespace /tmp/podman-e2e-3800923020/subtest-2923014207/runroot/networks/rootless-netns/rootless-netns: Permission denied
```
Fine, I give up.
